pages.raw_text:
With false whiskers and eye
brows that failed to match his air,
and his pockets full of deadly
weapons, c. H. Duncan of this city
was arrested at Boise yesterday,
according to reports from there. In
addition to his weird disguise and
arsenal. he was loaded with social
list literature and wicked leer He
seemed prepared to inaugurate a
season of devastation at the scene
of the Haywood trial, and the po-
lice locked him up.


Duncan is an organizer of the So
cialist labor party here. He is also
prominent in the Industrial Work
ers of the World organization. The
regular socialists repudiate him
completely. Furthermore, Duncan
is considered peculiar in his ways
and prone to distinguish himself by
freaky performances. He repeated
ly Jared the peaceful Sabbath gath.
erings of the socialists at Oliver
hall and was finally abated by be-
ing ruled off the floor. To say the
least, he is radical in his reform
ideas, but his friends are at a loss
TO account for his invasion of Boise
in disjointed disguise and warike
paraphernalia.
